_calibration: CALIBRATION FIXTURE (known-bad, deliberately committed): the citation-completeness class (Constitution Rule 14 / caution.md C-104). This is a status=candidate Compliance Object Model record whose citation.url points to a private commentary blog rather than an official statutory/regulatory source. catalogue/linters/citation-completeness.js MUST flag this record's citation.url as citation-host-unofficial in --calibrate mode, or it has not earned its zero.

records.name: UK GDPR privacy notice duty (calibration fixture: unofficial citation host)
applies_when: processes personal data of UK residents
excluded_when: genuinely no personal data collected at all

elements: identity and contact details of the controller

penalty.basis: Higher maximum of GBP 17.5m or 4% of turnover

sources: calibration fixture (deliberately seeded bad citation host)
